judgment.summary: Profitable, growing company with solid margins and a reasonable valuation, offering a good dividend yield.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 3.3%; next earnings date is 2026-06-18.
positives: Forward P/E of 11.89x suggests attractive valuation relative to expected earnings growth.
Revenue growth of 8.3% YoY and consistent earnings growth indicate steady business expansion.
Operating margin of 13.8% and profit margin of 10.6% demonstrate healthy profitability.
Return on equity at 24.8% and return on assets at 11.2% show efficient use of capital.
Strong free cash flow of $12.16B supports operations and shareholder returns.
Dividend yield of 3.6% provides income to shareholders.
negatives: PEG ratio of 1.26 suggests growth may not fully justify the current valuation.
Quarterly earnings growth of 2.1% is modest compared to annual figures.
Debt/Equity ratio of 25.47% is relatively low, but still a point to monitor.
Analyst target range is wide, indicating some uncertainty in future price expectations.

news.paragraph: Accenture plc (ACN) is being discussed as a potentially attractive AI stock, with recent headlines highlighting its valuation and market position. While the company's fundamentals appear solid, the discussion around its AI exposure and valuation suggests traders should consider the market's perception of its growth prospects in this area. The upcoming earnings report on June 18th will be a key catalyst to watch.

headlines.title: Is Accenture plc (ACN) Among the Best Affordable AI Stocks to Buy Right Now?
